_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Determine the authorization boundaries of systems.
reference_document_element_description: Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission grants, access reviews, and privilege escalation procedures.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-015 (DG, cosine: 0.494), DG-T-013 (DG, cosine: 0.489).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.461). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [authorization, boundaries, determine, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, controls, data, definitions, escalation, grants] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.888, R=0.870). Balanced P/R — the 6-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Determine the authorization boundaries of systems." and "Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission gra" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.503 ≈ STS 0.461 (gap 0.043). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [authorization, boundaries, determine, systems]. WIDAI terms: [access, controls, data, definitions, escalation, grants].
